name: Ukuphathwa Kokulimala Kokushisa
time_estimate: Kuqhubeka kuze kube yi-MEDEVAC noma ukuzinza kwesiguli
description: Ukulawulwa kwamajaqamba okushisa, ukucikeka kokushisa, kanye ne-heat stroke. Ukushisa kohlangothi kuyisimo esiphuthumayo esisongela ukuphila -- ukupholisa ngokushesha ukwelashwa. Hlukanisa ukuphela kokushisa (ukukhuluma okuvamile) kusukela ekushayweni kokushisa (okushintshiwe i-LOC) ngokushesha.
equipment: Amaphakethe eqhwa noma izindwangu ezimanzi ezibandayo
steps: UKUHLOLA: Ingabe abalimele baqaphile futhi baqondise? Isikhumba esomile esishisayo ngokumelene nesikhumba esijulukayo esishisayo? Izinga lokushisa eliyisisekelo uma i-thermometer ikhona.
UKUSHISA OKUSHISA: Ukuqina kwemisipha, ukucabanga okuvamile. Phumula emthunzini, ukubuyisela amanzi emlonyeni nge-electrolyte, ukwelula kancane. Ayifaki impilo engozini.

UKUKHALA OKUSHISA: Ukujuluka kakhulu, ubuthakathaka, isiyezi, ukucabanga okuvamile noma okuseduze nokujwayelekile. Yiya endaweni enomthunzi/epholile. Susa izingubo ezingaphezulu. Uketshezi lomlomo (uma uyazi) noma IV LR 1L ngaphezu kwemizuzu engama-30-60. Gada ukuqhubekela phambili ekushiseni.

I-HEAT STROKE (isimo esiphuthumayo): I-LOC eshintshile, ukudideka, ukulwa, noma ukuquleka. Izinga lokushisa eliphakathi > 40C (104F). Isikhumba esishisayo (kungenzeka sibe manzi noma somile). QALA: Khipha ekushiseni ngokushesha, susa zonke izingubo, isikhumba esimanzi nesiphephetha-moya ngamandla. Gcoba amaphakethe e-ice entanyeni, e-axillae, nase-groin (izindawo ezine-vascular high). IV LR 1-2L. Vikela indlela yokuphefumula uma equlekile. MEDEVAC ngokushesha.
UNGAMniki i-aspirin noma i-acetaminophen yokushisa -- ayisizi, ingase ilimaze.
Iqapha: okubalulekile q15 min, indlela yomoya, isimo sengqondo. Isitayela sesikhathi sedokhumenti.
Qhubeka uphole ngesikhathi se-MEDEVAC -- ungami ezokuthutha.
warnings: Ukushisa yisimo esiphuthumayo esisongela ukuphila -- ungaphazami njengokukhathala kokushisa. Hlola isimo sengqondo.
Ukupholisa ukwelapha okuwujuqu. Ungalibali ukupholisa ukuze uthole ukufinyelela kwe-IV.
Ukushisa okunamandla kungenzeka kubantu abalingana kahle -- ukuqina komzimba akuvikeli.
I-Hyponatremia (i-sodium ephansi) evela emanzini ngokweqile ngamanzi alula ingalingisa ukushisa -- nikeza isisombululo se-electrolyte hhayi amanzi kuphela.

pediatric.note: Izingane thermoregulate kancane kahle. Ukushisa kungathuthuka ngokushesha. Uketshezi olusekelwe isisindo: 20 mL/kg LR IV bolus. Izinga lokushisa eliyisisekelo nge-thermometer ye-rectal linembe kakhulu.

obstetric.note: I-hyperthermia kamama (>39C) ingabangela ukukhubazeka kwe-fetus neural tube (ekuseni) kanye nokucindezeleka kwe-fetus (sekwephuzile). Ukupholisa okunamandla. Ukuqapha izinga lokushaya kwenhliziyo yengane uma kukhona.

source: JTS CPG: Heat Stroke / PHTLS / US Army Hot Weather Training
